AlbumAddPhotoRequest.description: Add a single photo to an album via multipart/form-data

AlbumDeleteImgRequest.description: Remove photos from album request body

owner.description: Owner type. Allowed values: PRIVATE, TEMPORARY, SYSTEM, PUBLIC, OFFICIAL

AlbumImgVisitSignRequest.description: Generate signed visit URL request body

AlbumListResponse.description: Response containing a list of albums

AlbumPhotoListResponse.description: Response containing a list of album photos

wifi.description: WiFi switch. Allowed values: on, off

ble.description: Bluetooth switch. Allowed values: on, off

tf.description: TF card status. Allowed values: present, absent

orientation.description: Device orientation. Allowed values: 0 (Portrait), 90 (Landscape Left), 180 (Upside-down), 270 (Landscape Right)

status.description: Online status. Allowed values: ONLINE, OFFLINE, SLEEPING

orientation.description: Device orientation. Allowed values: 0 (Portrait), 90 (Landscape Left), 180 (Upside-down), 270 (Landscape Right)

currentStatus.description: Full current status data of the device

DeviceListResponse.description: Response containing a list of devices

strategyType.description: Strategy type. Allowed values: TRIGGER_ON_SERVER (server triggered), TRIGGER_ON_DEVICE (device triggered), FULL_DEVICE (fully controlled by device)

updateType.description: Update time type. Allowed values: FIXED (use updateTimeList), INTERVAL (use beginTime/endTime/intervalMinutes)

playOrder.description: Play order. Allowed values: SEQUENTIALLY, SHUFFLE

idle.description: Idle after play. Allowed values: 0 (sleep), 1 (no sleep)

widgetKey.description: Widget key, present when strategyType is widget-based

DevicePlayStrategyListResponse.description: Response containing a list of carousels (device play strategies)

DevicePlayStrategyResponse.description: Response containing a carousel (device play strategy)

strategyType.description: Strategy type. Allowed values: TRIGGER_ON_SERVER (server triggered), TRIGGER_ON_DEVICE (device triggered), FULL_DEVICE (fully controlled by device)

updateType.description: Update time type. Allowed values: FIXED (use updateTimeList), INTERVAL (use beginTime/endTime/intervalMinutes)

playOrder.description: Play order. Allowed values: SEQUENTIALLY, SHUFFLE

albumIdList.description: Album ID list as image source

idle.description: Idle after play. Allowed values: 0 (sleep), 1 (no sleep)

timezone.description: Timezone ID, will also be injected into request header 'timezone' for downstream

DevicePubkeyResponse.description: Response containing latest device pubkey report

DevicePublishAlbumRequest.description: Publish an existing album image to device request body

url.description: Image URL (http or https), e.g., https://example.com/image.jpg

DevicePublishResponse.description: Response containing publish result (play record ID)

info.description:
Open API for InkJoy Platform.

## Authentication
Use `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

## Base URLs
- Global: https://openapi.inkjoyframe.com
- Mainland: https://openapi.advisor.epaperframe.com

## Notes
- All responses use a unified `Result` wrapper (`code`, `msg`, `data`).

## Demos
- Web Tool: https://openapi.inkjoyframe.com/inkjoy-web-tool-demo.html
- NAS Memories: https://github.com/InkJoy-Frame/inkjoy-nas-memories
info.title: InkJoy Open API

tags.name: Albums
tags.description: Operations related to personal albums (create, rename, delete, add/remove photos)

tags.name: Carousels
tags.description: Operations related to creating and listing personal album carousels (device play strategies)

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: Operations related to device management and control

post.description: Creates a personal album for the current user.
Uploads an image file via multipart/form-data and adds it into a personal album.
Removes photos from a personal album by imgId list.
Generates a signed URL for visiting an album image URI.
Lists personal albums of the current user.

put.description: Updates the album name for a personal album.

post.description: Authenticates a user using email and password, returning a JWT token.
Creates a device play strategy that can reference album photos for carousel playback.

put.description: Changes carousel status. Allowed values: ACTIVE, INACTIVE.

parameters.description: New status. Allowed values: ACTIVE, INACTIVE
parameters.name: status

post.description: Lists carousels (device play strategies) of the current user, including both album and widget strategies.

put.description: Updates an existing album carousel (device play strategy).

delete.description: Deletes an existing album carousel (device play strategy).

get.description: Retrieves a list of devices bound to the current user.

post.description: Selects an existing image in a personal album and sends it to the specified device for display.

get.description: Retrieves the latest pubkey report of the specified device.

post.description: Sends a single image to the specified device for display. Supports uploading a file or providing an image URL.
